identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a top 1% Sports League Management System with a 'Night Match' aesthetic.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Sports Broadcast visuals with SaaS precision.
Emotion First: Every screen feels like 'Game Night'.
Content is King: Data (scores, stats) is the hero.
Zoom In: Focus on player stats and live moments.
Negative Space: Use dark voids to make neon stats pop.

theme.name: Night Match
theme.description: A dark, immersive interface inspired by night cricket matches under floodlights. Deep blacks, neon greens, and electric blues.

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Hero text

typography.installation: Import these fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Chivo:wght@700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@500&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;700&display=swap');

dashboard.grid: Mode B: The Control Room Grid

buttons.style: Sharp edges or minimal radius (rounded-md). High contrast hover states.

cards.style: Glassmorphism or Solid Dark Surface with Neon Border Glow on hover.
cards.base: bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: Flat, dark background, bottom border focus or full ring.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays on solid backgrounds to prevent 'digital flatness'.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use 'Tracing Beam' borders for feature cards. No full-screen gradients.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows for primary actions (e.g., Green glow for 'Start Match').

general: Implement the 'Night Match' theme immediately by updating tailwind.config.js and index.css.
Use the provided image URLs for all placeholder images.
Ensure all text meets APCA contrast standards against the dark background.
Use 'Chivo' for all headings and 'JetBrains Mono' for all stats/numbers.
Use shadcn/ui components for all interactive elements but customize their styling to match the 'Night Match' theme (remove rounded corners, add glows).
For the Dashboard, use the 'Control Room' grid layout (dense, data-heavy).
For the Landing Page, use the 'Tetris' grid layout (asymmetric, artistic).

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations.
